items.headline: Mikel Arteta on Man City 2-1 Arsenal: 'the Premier League starts again'
items.description: Mikel Arteta has suggested "the Premier League starts again" after Arsenal were beaten at Manchester City on Sunday but insisted the Gunners still believe they can win the title.
